examples: In fact, most biofuels are still based on ethanol.
Ethanol is corrosive and has less energy per litre than petrol and diesel.
I've got some notes here about the process of turning plant-matter into ethanol.
In my view, the ethanol subsidy is now redundant with the mandates in place.
Several Hollywood and Nashville stars boast of converting their huge plush cars to run on ethanol.
